ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Req, Hits) */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the metric */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum value of the metric */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., Request, Cache, Response) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "is_aggregate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is an aggregate metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the web application */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the web application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Active, Maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name or ID of the application owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the data belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data point was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Recorded value of the performance metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the data point (for user-specific metrics) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation of the user (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric to monitor */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_email" TEXT /* Email address for alert notifications */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alert notifications (e.g., Immediate, Daily) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., Critical, Warning) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert setting is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application for which the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "report_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report metric entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being reported */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric in the report */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the metric (e.g., Improving, Declining) */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change compared to the previous period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trend entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being tracked */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend tracking */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend tracking */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value of the metric over the tracked period */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the metric over the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_trends_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_trends_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Failed) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alert_settings ("alert_id")
)
